location.name: Art appraisers in Sacramento, California
location.description: Compare art appraisers in Sacramento, California.

listedAppraisers.name: Janet L. Ross
listedAppraisers.description: Janet L. Ross provides professional art appraisal services specializing in Fine art, Antique furniture, Decorative arts, Collectibles. With 30+ years experience, we offer expert valuations for insurance, estate planning, charitable donations, and more.
